channel.title: Frontier Structural Engineering | Serving Colorado and California
channel.description: Recent content on Frontier Structural Engineering | Serving Colorado and California

item.title: Unlocking Stunning Views: How Moment Frames Elevate Modern Design
item.description: In today’s architectural landscape, creating buildings with expansive glass facades and unobstructed views is a hallmark of luxury and innovation. At Frontier Structural Engineering, we specialize in moment frame design that makes this possible.

item.title: A Solid Platform: Better resources, sharper focus, new fire.
item.description: Assembling a Winning Platform. With the freedom a good investment gives, Frontier started as a question: what would it take for an engineering business to provide a new level of service, a tighter focus, and better results for clients?

item.title: Gripstone Climbing Gym Expansion
item.description: Structural design for a major expansion of the Gripstone Climbing Gym, adding new wall sections and support structures.

item.title: Denver Multi-use Project
item.description: Consultation and structural design for a mixed-use development in Denver, Colorado.

item.title: Leading Into Opportunity
item.description: “Go ahead!” — Davy Crockett. There is a bit of an adventurer in each of us who love to go where there’s opportunity. Being at the frontier means going ahead where not many have gone, making the way a little easier for others.

item.title: Construction Support, Temporary Structures and Shoring
item.description: Temporary structure and shoring design to keep construction projects moving safely and on schedule.

item.title: Deck Cover
item.description: Covered deck addition — structural design for a new covered outdoor living space on an existing residential deck.

item.title: Deck Replacement
item.description: Residential deck replacement — structural assessment and design for a safe, code-compliant new deck structure.

item.title: Sasquatch Cookies
item.description: Retail tenant improvement — structural review and support for a new retail bakery location.
